positive: A cyberpunk-inspired portrait of a futuristic samurai warrior standing in a neon-lit Tokyo alleyway. Intricate metallic armor, glowing circuitry accents, rain-slicked pavement reflection. Cinematic, dramatic lighting, highly detailed digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft focus, cartoonish
